finalized_plan.description: Use the search_agent tool to search for USGS records or publications that mention the first documented occurrence of the American Alligator west of Texas (excluding Texas), ensuring to include relevant keywords such as "USGS American Alligator first found west of Texas year" in the query
Review and verify the source found to ensure that it is an official USGS publication or report
Extract the documented year from the USGS record that indicates when the American Alligator was first found west of Texas
Cross-check the extracted year with any additional credible information from USGS or related historical data to verify its correctness
Use the final_answer tool to provide the verified year as the final answer

root_cause_reasoning: The agent failed to invoke the search tool and fabricated the answer at step 4.
